page_metadata.biotools__summary: DaTeR (short for "Dating Trees using Relative constraints") is a program for improved dating of microbial species phylogenies using relative time constraints (e.g., obtained from high-confidence horizontal gene transfer events).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DaTeR (short for "Dating Trees using Relative constraints") is a program for improved dating of microbial species phylogenies using relative time constraints (e.g., obtained from high-confidence horizontal gene transfer events).
